data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protecting user data from interception with robust encryption protocols.

data.title: 2-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: An additional layer of security to ensure that only the intended user can access their account.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducting frequent security assessments to identify and fix vulnerabilities.

data.title: Content Security Policy (CSP)
data.description: Preventing a variety of attacks by defining which content sources are trustworthy.

data.title: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
data.description: Ensuring sensitive data is not accessed or transmitted outside authorized channels.
